azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.thread.started'
| summarize sessions = sum(valueSum) by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.conversation.turn.count'
| summarize turns = sum(valueSum) by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.turn.token_usage'
| where tostring(customDimensions['token_type']) == 'total'
| summarize tokens = sum(valueSum) by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.description: Sum of codex.tool.call across all tools

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.tool.call'
| summarize calls = sum(valueSum) by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Tool Calls

panels.description: cached_input / input * 100 — share of prompt tokens served from prompt cache

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.turn.token_usage'
| extend tt = tostring(customDimensions['token_type'])
| where tt in ('input','cached_input')
| summarize total = sum(valueSum) by tt
| evaluate pivot(tt, sum(total))
| extend cacheHitPct = todouble(coalesce(toreal(['cached_input']), 0.0)) * 100.0 / todouble(coalesce(toreal(['input']), 1.0))
| project cacheHitPct

panels.title: Prompt Cache Hit Rate

panels.description: Tool calls with success='false' / all tool calls

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.tool.call'
| extend isFail = iff(tostring(customDimensions['success']) == 'false', valueSum, 0.0)
| summarize total = sum(valueSum), failures = sum(isFail)
| extend failurePct = iff(total > 0, failures * 100.0 / total, 0.0)
| project failurePct

panels.title: Tool Failure Rate

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.turn.e2e_duration_ms'
| summarize p95s = percentile(valueSum, 95) / 1000.0
| project p95s

customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.turn.ttft.duration_ms'
| summarize p95ms = percentile(valueSum, 95)
| project p95ms

panels.description: Token usage per $__interval, broken out by token_type. Reasoning_output is gpt-5 chain-of-thought tokens; cached_input is prompt-cache hits.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.turn.token_usage'
| extend tt = tostring(customDimensions['token_type'])
| where tt != 'total'
| summarize tokens = sum(valueSum) by bin(timestamp, $__interval), tt
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Token usage by type

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.turn.token_usage'
| where tostring(customDimensions['token_type']) == 'total'
| summarize tokens = sum(valueSum) by model = tostring(customDimensions['model'])
| order by tokens desc

customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.turn.e2e_duration_ms'
| summarize p50 = percentile(valueSum, 50), p90 = percentile(valueSum, 90), p99 = percentile(valueSum, 99) by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.description: codex.turn.ttft.duration_ms (first response token) and codex.turn.ttfm.duration_ms (first model output, post-reasoning)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name in ('codex.turn.ttft.duration_ms','codex.turn.ttfm.duration_ms')
| extend metric = replace_string(name, 'codex.turn.', '')
| summarize p50 = percentile(valueSum, 50), p90 = percentile(valueSum, 90) by bin(timestamp, $__interval), metric
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: First response latency

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.thread.started'
| summarize sessions = sum(valueSum) by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.conversation.turn.count'
| summarize turns = sum(valueSum) by bin(timestamp, $__interval)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.description: codex.tool.call grouped by tool, with success vs failure breakdown and failure rate

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.tool.call'
| extend ok = tostring(customDimensions['success']) == 'true'
| summarize total = sum(valueSum), successes = sumif(valueSum, ok), failures = sumif(valueSum, not(ok)) by tool = tostring(customDimensions['tool'])
| extend failPct = iff(total > 0, round(failures * 100.0 / total, 1), 0.0)
| order by total desc

panels.title: Tool reliability by tool

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.tool.call.duration_ms'
| summarize p50_ms = percentile(valueSum, 50), p95_ms = percentile(valueSum, 95), n = count() by tool = tostring(customDimensions['tool'])
| order by n desc

panels.description: Distribution of tool calls by sandbox_policy (read-only, workspace-write, danger-full-access)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.tool.call'
| summarize calls = sum(valueSum) by sandbox_policy = tostring(customDimensions['sandbox_policy'])
| order by calls desc

panels.title: Tool calls by sandbox policy

panels.description: codex.approval.requested grouped by approved status (approved, denied, approved_with_amendment)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.approval.requested'
| summarize n = sum(valueSum) by approved = tostring(customDimensions['approved'])
| order by n desc

panels.title: Approval outcomes

panels.description: Sessions split by originator (codex-tui, codex_exec, Codex_Desktop, ...) — useful to spot which front-end is driving usage

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where cloud_RoleName startswith 'codex'
| where name == 'codex.thread.started'
| summarize sessions = sum(valueSum) by originator = tostring(customDimensions['originator'])
| order by sessions desc

panels.title: Sessions by client
